signOutPopup.title: Sign out
signOutPopup.message: Are you sure you want to sign out?
signOutPopup.error: Sign out failed. Please try again.

idleTimeout.title: Session
idleTimeout.helpText: You can extend your session or sign out now.

accessDenied.title: Access denied
accessDenied.roleMessage: You are logged in, but your role is not allowed to access this page.
accessDenied.serviceUnavailableMessage: Authentication could not be verified right now. Try again in a moment.

dashboardPage.title: Dashboard
dashboardPage.description: Your key information and quick access to the next actions.

upcomingMeeting.title: Your next date
upcomingMeeting.description: This card shows the nearest meeting with your active registration.
upcomingMeeting.emptyTitle: You do not have any active registrations yet.
upcomingMeeting.emptyDescription: Go to meetings and pick a date to see it here.
upcomingMeeting.unavailableTitle: Your registrations could not be loaded.
upcomingMeeting.unavailableDescription: Try again in a moment or open the meetings module directly.
